expectedQuestions.decisionValue: Which mechanisms are weak (SN1/SN2, elimination, addition)? → determines phase order and drill focus. Without this question, plan lacks subject specificity = FAIL.

effortModel.citation: Retaker effect: 70-75% of first-attempt speed; 5.5 × 0.75 ≈ 4.1; r/premed retaker data confirms; TC-04 (5.5) is higher because first-attempt

expectedStrategy: MUST differ from TC-04: different min/page, different session structure
Session split: 50% scan/read + 40% mechanism drill + 10% self-test
Mechanism drill 40-50% time allocation (30% is insufficient — focus on failure cause)
toneExpectation: tactical without shame — '아는 거 다시 읽느라 낭비하지 마. 메커니즘 나올 때마다 멈추고 직접 그려.'. Do NOT mention 'failed' or trigger shame.
